## Sleeve.upgradeMemory() method

Upgrade memory of a sleeve. You must be in BitNode 10 to use this API.

**Signature:**

```typescript
upgradeMemory(sleeveNumber: number, amount: number): Result;
```

## Remarks

RAM cost: 4 GB
